---
title: "Harriet Dyke Griffith"
---

## Harriet Dyke Griffith

**Dates:** (1841-1921)

**Maiden name:** (Acland Troyte)

### Description

daughter of Arthur Acland Troyte

### Biography

She married (1863) George Griffith.

### Letters

- Letter from March 5th [1862[[footnote:2]]]
- Letter from May 26th 1857

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
